objectives: Understand the fundamental concepts of machine learning.
Learn how to implement basic machine learning algorithms using Python.
Explore data preprocessing techniques in Python.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python

objectives: Develop skills in data cleaning and transformation using Python.
Learn to build data processing applications.
Understand the importance of feature engineering for machine learning models.
prerequisites: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
learning_path.title: Data Processing and Preparation for Machine Learning

objectives: Grasp the core concepts of deep learning.
Build and train simple neural networks using TensorFlow.
Understand the role of TensorFlow in machine learning workflows.
prerequisites: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
learning_path.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals with TensorFlow

objectives: Explore advanced deep learning architectures.
Implement and train models using PyTorch.
Compare and contrast TensorFlow and PyTorch for deep learning tasks.
learning_path.title: Advanced Deep Learning with PyTorch

objectives: Reinforce understanding of key statistical concepts relevant to machine learning.
Apply statistical methods for data analysis and model evaluation.
Interpret statistical results in the context of machine learning problems.
learning_path.title: Statistical Foundations for Machine Learning

objectives: Design and implement robust data processing applications.
Optimize data pipelines for efficiency and scalability.
Integrate data processing with machine learning workflows.
prerequisites: Data Processing and Preparation for Machine Learning
learning_path.title: Building Production-Ready Data Processing Pipelines

objectives: Apply machine learning algorithms to solve real-world problems.
Utilize TensorFlow for building and deploying machine learning models.
Develop practical programming skills in a project-based environment.
prerequisites: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
learning_path.title: Applied Machine Learning Projects with Python and TensorFlow

objectives: Explore advanced deep learning architectures and techniques.
Leverage statistical insights for model tuning and interpretation.
Implement complex models using PyTorch for research and development.
learning_path.title: Advanced Topics in Deep Learning with PyTorch and Statistics

matched_occupation.description: Computer vision engineers research, design, develop, and train artificial intelligence algorithms and machine learning primitives that understand the content of digital images based on a large amount of data. They apply this understanding to solve different real-world problems such as security, autonomous driving, robotic manufacturing, digital image classification, medical image processing and diagnosis, etc.
matched_occupation.label: computer vision engineer
